api: Amazon Selling Partner API (SP-API), official Swagger models from amzn/selling-partner-api-models
scope: Pass B full-surface manifest across 353 documented operations from the official SP-API models. JSON GET endpoints are covered by streams when they fit the current declarative engine; path/body-only mutations are covered by writes. Operations requiring elevated authorization, binary/document handling, dynamic POST read bodies, or mutation query parameters are specifically excluded.

excluded.reason: read/search-style POST operation requires a request body; stream reads cannot send dynamic request bodies in the current engine
